winning_test.source:
import pytest

from gradebook.analytics import percentile


def test_percentile_at_100_returns_largest_score():
    assert percentile([7, 2, 11], 100) == 11
winning_test.targeted_behavior: At p=100, the computed index equals the score count; the original clamps it to the last valid index while the mutant indexes past the end.
